global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple financial service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller circular shape is positioned towards the bottom, contributing to the overall design without a specific function.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed, with a smaller line below it reading 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' appears at the top in a clear, modern font, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom reads 'Claim reward' in bold text, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and minimalistic, ClearLedger, Secure & simple, Claim reward
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the headline is centered in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, ClearLedger, Claim reward
